name: PhenixFIN Corporation  5.25% Notes due 2028
summary: PhenixFIN Corporation 5.25% Notes due 2028 are debt securities issued by PhenixFIN Corporation. These notes represent a borrowing by the company and obligate PhenixFIN to pay interest at a rate of 5.25% until the notes mature in 2028. PhenixFIN Corporation is a publicly traded business development company.
